project: Last Mile Operations - SQL Work Sample
description: Senior BI Analyst / SQL Operations assessment for Last Mile operations in LATAM (Mexico, Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Chile, Peru) to audit data quality, evaluate operational metrics (Productivity, Effectiveness, OTH), and investigate timezone issues and carrier consistency.

features.name: exploratory_data_analysis
features.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (first_eda.py)
features.description: Perform local Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) on the raw CSV data files to discover data patterns, distribution shape, and initial data quality issues.
acceptance: Analyze shape and summary statistics of the raw CSV files
Generate initial data quality profile reports
Identify discrepancies in dates and timestamps across tables

features.name: bigquery_data_load
features.title: BigQuery Data Loading & ETL (load_to_bigquery.py)
features.description: Clean and format raw timestamps in Python to standard ISO-8601 representation and load all tables to BigQuery cleanly.
acceptance: Develop a robust datetime parsing logic using Python and pandas
Upload distribution centers, partners, vehicles, routes, shipments, and logs into BigQuery
Ensure 0 bad records and correct schema parsing on load

features.name: data_audit_validation
features.title: Data Audit & Validation
features.description: Audit the routes and shipments tables comprehensively to identify data quality issues affecting analysis and propose mitigations.
acceptance: Identify main data quality issues (duplicates, null timestamps, timezone discrepancies, chrono violations, route overlaps, orphaned routes, invalid contract flags)
Provide SQL query executing validation checks
Document data quality handling strategy

features.name: route_productivity
features.title: Productivity - Route Utilization
features.description: Measure route utilization efficiency for completed DELIVERY routes in April-May 2025 by country, identifying underperforming routes.
acceptance: Calculate stops efficiency and capacity utilization by country
Analyze underperforming routes (stops efficiency < 60%)
Explain data handling decisions

features.name: delivery_effectiveness
features.title: Effectiveness - Delivery Rate
features.description: Calculate delivery effectiveness rate for April-May 2025, breaking it down by partner country, and identify partner anomalies.
acceptance: Calculate success rate by country and partner
Highlight exceptional/unusual performance and analyze root causes (synthetic homogeneity, sample size variance)

features.name: on_time_handling
features.title: OTH - On-Time Handling
features.description: Evaluate schedule performance (On-Time Handling) by partner and vehicle type for completed DELIVERY routes in April-May 2025.
acceptance: Calculate OTH by hour of fin and by duration
Identify underperforming partners and vehicles
Analyze differences between end time and duration metrics

features.name: timezone_investigation
features.title: Operational Patterns - Timezones
features.description: Investigate late-night deliveries in Brazil and Colombia to determine if it is a timezone illusion (UTC vs local time).
acceptance: Convert event timestamps from UTC to local time using timezone offset
Analyze real vs apparent late-night delivery rates
Highlight event_hour_utc corruption

features.name: partner_consistency
features.title: Partner Consistency (PT-014)
features.description: Investigate inconsistent performance metrics for PT-014 (SaoPauloShip) and recommend whether to include it in reporting.
acceptance: Find stale routes in IN_PROGRESS state
Analyze GPS synchronization/chronology issues
Explain route overlaps across different hubs and determine validity
Provide recommendation for exclusion/inclusion

features.name: dashboard_narrative
features.title: Dashboard & Strategic Narrative
features.description: Synthesize findings from Q1-Q6 into a professional dashboard and a 2-3 page narrative document detailing operational recommendations.
acceptance: Create operational dashboard mockups/visualizations
Write a narrative document explaining the operational story (Problem -> Evidence -> Action)
Guide the viewer to specific recommendations (Cono Sur fleet reallocation, hub dispatch audits, API integrations)
